data.title: myHealthTrack Accepted Into CMS’s Landmark ACCESS Model for Chronic MSK Care
data.description: A digital MSK platform called myHealthTrack, which utilizes responsible AI trained by clinicians, has been approved to participate in CMS's ACCESS model in San Diego. This platform aims to provide innovative solutions for musculoskeletal health through digital means.

data.title: Kin Launches Direct-to-Consumer Home Insurance in Oklahoma
data.description: Chicago-based insurance company, Kin, has recently expanded its services to Oklahoma on April 16, 2026. The direct-to-consumer digital home insurance provider is now offering critical and personalized coverage to homeowners in the state. This expansion provides Oklahoma residents with a new opportunity to access clear and tailored insurance options to meet their needs.

data.title: RethinkFirst Appoints Rob Kennedy as Senior Vice President of Enterprise Sales
data.description: A highly-experienced sales executive in the Software as a Service (SaaS) industry has been appointed to spearhead the expansion of enterprise operations and enhance market strategies for RethinkCare and RethinkEd. In a press release dated April 16, 2026, RethinkFirst, a prominent company specializing in technological solutions for behavioral health and neurodiversity, disclosed the news. The new executive is expected to leverage their expertise in boosting growth for the organization.

data.title: PLT Health Solutions' TestFACTOR® Powers Launch of Jocko Fuel's COMBAT TESTED 3.0
data.description: Jocko Fuel, a performance nutrition brand based in Jay, Maine, USA, has recently introduced a revamped Testosterone Optimization Product supported by four human clinical studies. This product, unveiled by PLT Health Solutions, Inc. in Morristown, New Jersey on April 16, 2026, promises to enhance strength, energy, and focus. With a focus on delivering proven results, Jocko Fuel's latest offering aims to demonstrate its effectiveness through rigorous scientific research.

data.title: Comfort Classics and Food Truck Favorites, Reinvigorated: Soules Kitchen Debuts New Entrées and Street Eats
data.description: Introducing a brand-new line of refrigerated meals crafted from authentic ingredients, set to be available across the country starting on April 18. Located in TYLER, Texas, this innovative development by Soules Kitchen, a renowned player in fully cooked proteins, aims to streamline meal preparation for consumers. The introduction includes two distinct product lines showcasing the company's commitment to culinary excellence and convenience.

data.title: Tungsten Automation Finalising IRAP Assessment – PROTECTED Level in Australia
data.description: Tungsten Automation, a prominent player in AI-driven intelligent document and workflow automation services worldwide, proudly declares its progress towards attaining IRAP Assessed – PROTECTED level accreditation. In a recent evaluation by an external auditor authorized by the Australian Government, Tungsten is moving closer to meeting the rigorous security criteria laid out by the Australian Cyber Security Centre (ACSC). This development underscores Tungsten's resolve to backing governmental initiatives and maintaining top-notch security protocols.
NACON delays release of 2025/2026 sales and full-year results.

data.title: NetActuate and NETINT Deliver Global VPU-Accelerated Infrastructure for Cloud-Scale Deployments
data.description: NetActuate, a top provider of global edge infrastructure and network services, has announced a new partnership that enables hardware-accelerated video encoding and decoding services on NETINT VPUs. This collaboration allows for scalable video processing across NetActuate's worldwide network platform. The news was disclosed in Las Vegas on April 16, 2026. This partnership aims to offer efficient video processing solutions on a large scale, with the potential to significantly enhance performance and speed.

data.title: doxo’s 2026 Cost of Bills Index™ (COBI) Highlights Where Bills Cost the Most—and Least—Across the U.S. as Cost Gaps Widen
data.description: In Seattle, the latest 2026 Cost of Bills Index™ (COBI) Report from doxo reveals a significant disparity in essential household expenses nationwide. Analyzing doxo’s bill payment data, the report demonstrates that core household bills differ greatly by region. The cost of living in states like California, Hawaii, and Massachusetts is notably higher, with residents paying up to 38% more than the national median. On the other hand, households in

data.title: Harry Davis & Company Facilitates Sale of Alpenrose Butter Operations to Plant Based Innovations
data.description: In Pittsburgh, Harry Davis & Company (HDC) revealed the completion of the sale of the ex-Alpenrose butter, sour cream, and ice cream mix operations in Clackamas, Oregon. About 35 jobs are retained due to this deal, securing ongoing production and backing the local dairy supply chain. The purchaser, Plant Based Innovations (PBI), possesses three modern manufacturing sites strategically positioned on the East and West Coasts.

data.title: How TRĒ House Is Setting a New Benchmark for Product Transparency
data.description: In Los Angeles on April 16, 2026, TRĒ House announced their commitment to unparalleled product transparency within the legal hemp and mushroom industry. Leading the way since 2022, TRĒ House stands out for its innovative product range in the legal recreational hemp and mushroom sector. The brand is establishing new industry benchmarks, ensuring transparency and quality in their products.

data.title: USPS To Release Stamps Honoring National Bird
data.description: On April 16, 2026, the U.S. Postal Service will be releasing a new set of commemorative postage stamps known as the Bald Eagle: Hatchling to Adult collection. This collection will feature images showcasing the growth of a bald eagle from hatchling to adulthood. The first-day-of-issue event for these stamps will be held outdoors and is open to the public free of charge. The news about this release is being spread using a unique hashtag on social media platforms.

data.title: Legacy Launches $145 Clinical Semen Analysis, Setting New Price Benchmark
data.description: Legacy, the prominent digital male fertility clinic, has revealed its latest initiative on April 16, 2026. The company is enhancing its clinical services by making sperm DNA fragmentation testing more accessible. This move aims to provide a wider range of patients and healthcare providers with top-tier semen analysis services.

data.title: Mortgage Rates Continue to Decline
data.description: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, VA, announced on April 16, 2026, that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) had an average rate of 6.30%, according to their Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ® ). This data was disclosed by the company known by the ticker symbol OTCQB: FMCC.

data.title: Star Group, L.P. Increases Annual Distribution by 5 Cents, to 79 Cents per Unit
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, on April 16, 2026, Star Group, L.P., known as Star, a provider of home energy services, disclosed that the quarterly distribution for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, has risen to $0.1975 per common unit from $0.1850 per common unit on the NYSE as SGU. This increase amounts to $0.05 annually, totaling $0.79. Notably, this is the 14th consecutive year in which the Company has raised its dividend annually.
